mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of observations when FEDFUNDS remains below 0.5%, or Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the unemployment rate signals improving labor market absorption and rising consumer income, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE declines by >0.5 percentage points over a 3-month window
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns are negative in >60% of instances following a >0.5pp UNRATE decline, or the signal loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real sales of automobiles combined with expanding industrial production indicates synchronized demand and supply recovery, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when RSAFS and INDPRO both increase, or interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.05) in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: When core inflation accelerates while policy rates remain near zero, real yields turn deeply negative and erode corporate profit margins, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in >50% of observations during periods where CPIAUCSL rises >0.3% monthly while FEDFUNDS stays below 0.25%, or out-of-sample Sharpe ratio < 0.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp acceleration in housing starts signals renewed construction activity and wealth effects that lift consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in >55% of cases following a >10% HOUST surge, or the signal predictive power vanishes when controlling for interest rate changes.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and corporate revenue growth, which consistently generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.01 over rolling 3-year windows, or 20-day forward returns show no significant correlation with INDPRO growth rates (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms broad-based labor market tightening, which produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative returns in >60% of triggered months, or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating real GDP growth signals robust aggregate demand and expanding corporate earnings, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns are negative in >50% of quarters following >2.0% GDPC1 growth, or the signal fails to beat a buy-and-hold benchmark in walk-forward validation.
